message:
test: add E2E tool execution test suite with artifact logging (bd-2xyv)

New 926-line test file exercising all 7 built-in tools (read, write,
edit, bash, grep, find, ls) end-to-end through the ToolRegistry with
artifact logging for conformance validation.

Test coverage includes:
- ReadTool: basic line-numbered output, offset+limit, binary detection
- WriteTool: create file, overwrite, content verification
- EditTool: string replacement, uniqueness validation
- BashTool: command execution, timeout, output capture
- GrepTool: pattern matching, context lines (requires rg on PATH)
- FindTool: glob pattern matching (requires fd on PATH)
- LsTool: directory listing, file metadata

Each test writes JSONL artifacts recording tool input/output for
downstream conformance analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
